title: T-011 — Inter-site TO cost allocation (sender/receiver/split/none) + 10-FIN handoff (§9.6, §11.3 V-MS-13/14)
prompt:
# T-011 — Inter-site TO cost allocation + 10-FIN handoff

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §9.6, §11.3 V-MS-13 (split requires split_ratio metadata), V-MS-14 (cost>0 + method='none' warn)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build the cost allocation dispatcher invoked from the `transfer_order.received` outbox consumer. Allocates `transfer_cost` between from-site and to-site per `cost_allocation_method` and posts to 10-FIN `inventory_cost_layers` per site.

## Implementation contract
1. New module `packages/domain/src/transfer-orders/cost-allocation.ts`:
   - `allocateTransferCost(to)` returns `{ from_site_allocation: number, to_site_allocation: number }` per method:
     - 'sender' → {from: 100%, to: 0}.
     - 'receiver' → {from: 0, to: 100%}.
     - 'split' → reads `transfer_cost_metadata.split_ratio` JSONB ({from: 0.5, to: 0.5} default; refuse if missing per V-MS-13 warn-level escalated to error here).
     - 'none' → {from: 0, to: 0}; if transfer_cost > 0 emit warning to observability (V-MS-14).
2. Outbox consumer `apps/worker/src/handlers/inter-site-transfer-received.ts` (re-uses T-112 worker scaffold):
   - On `transfer_order.received` event, call allocateTransferCost(to).
   - Post to inventory_cost_layers per site via 10-FIN action `postInventoryCostLayer({org_id, site_id, layer_amount, source_to_id})` — idempotent on (source_to_id, site_id).
3. Tests: matrix of 4 methods × happy/edge paths; V-MS-13 missing split_ratio throws; V-MS-14 warn surfaces in observability (T-117 redact); idempotent posting (replay does not double-post).

## Files
- packages/domain/src/transfer-orders/cost-allocation.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/handlers/inter-site-transfer-received.ts [create]
- packages/domain/__tests__/transfer-orders/cost-allocation.test.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/handlers/__tests__/inter-site-transfer-received.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given a TO with transfer_cost=1000 and method='sender', when allocateTransferCost runs, then result is {from:1000, to:0}.
2. Given method='split' and transfer_cost_metadata.split_ratio={from:0.6,to:0.4}, when allocateTransferCost runs, then {from:600,to:400}.
3. Given method='split' and split_ratio is missing, when allocateTransferCost runs, then SplitRatioMissing is thrown (V-MS-13).
4. Given method='none' and transfer_cost=500, when allocateTransferCost runs, then result is {from:0,to:0} and a warn-level observability event 'V-MS-14-cost-with-none-method' is emitted.
5. Given a transfer_order.received outbox event is consumed, when the handler completes, then two inventory_cost_layers rows (one per site, allocation amounts non-negative) are inserted in 10-FIN with source_to_id=to.id; replay of the same event does not duplicate.
6. Given a transfer_order.received event with allocation = {0, 0}, when handler runs, then no inventory_cost_layers rows are inserted (zero-amount skipped).

## Test strategy
- RED: matrix of 4 methods × happy/edge + V-MS-13 negative + V-MS-14 warn surfaces + idempotent replay before module exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/domain test transfer-orders/cost-allocation' + 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test inter-site-transfer-received'.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-100% sums for split — split_ratio must satisfy from+to == 1.0 within float tolerance else throw.
- Do not post to inventory_cost_layers without site_id — every row must be site-scoped per §6.4. The withSiteContext HOF establishes session site context via app.current_site_id() which RLS on inventory_cost_layers uses as the site predicate; never read raw GUC directly.
- Do not double-post on replay — idempotent on (source_to_id, site_id).
- Do not silently skip V-MS-14 (cost>0 + method='none') — must surface to observability (T-117).
- Do not couple cost allocation to a specific currency — currency comes from rate card / TO row (T-013).

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement cost_allocation_method dispatcher (sender/receiver/split/none) + V-MS-13 split_ratio metadata JSONB requirement + V-MS-14 warn when transfer_cost > 0 and method='none' + 10-FIN ledger posting (inventory_cost_layers per-site allocation on transfer_order.received outbox consumer).

Do not implement multi-entity FX handling (P2 EPIC 14-I).
Do not implement journal-entry rendering UI.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: 10-FIN owns the table; this task is a consumer.
Cross-mod dep to 00-foundation T-125 declared (withOrgContext + app.current_org_id() per F11 rule). withSiteContext composes on top of T-125; all site-scoped tasks must carry this cross-module dep.

acceptance_criteria: Given TO with transfer_cost=1000 method='sender', when allocateTransferCost runs, then result {from:1000, to:0}; AND given method='split' and split_ratio={from:0.6,to:0.4} when run then {from:600,to:400}.

Given method='split' and split_ratio missing, when run, then SplitRatioMissing thrown (V-MS-13); AND given method='none' transfer_cost=500 when run then {from:0,to:0} and observability event 'V-MS-14-cost-without-allocation' emitted.
Given transfer_order.received outbox event consumed, when handler completes, then 2 inventory_cost_layers rows (one per site) inserted idempotent on (source_to_id, site_id).
Given received event with allocation {0,0}, when handler runs, then no inventory_cost_layers rows inserted.
test_strategy: RED: matrix of 4 methods × paths + V-MS-13 + V-MS-14 + idempotent replay before module exists.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow non-100% sums for split — from+to == 1.0 within float tolerance.
Do not post to inventory_cost_layers without site_id (§6.4).
Do not double-post on replay — idempotent on (source_to_id, site_id).
Do not silently skip V-MS-14 — must surface to observability.
Do not couple to a hardcoded currency — comes from TO/rate card.
